response.original_title: Balanço do Rock, A Mais Tribal de Todas as Festas
response.overview: A documentary celebrating the history and cultural impact of Balanço do Rock, the legendary radio program that helped shape and promote the rock scene in Pará, Brazil. Through archival footage, interviews, and performances, the film revisits decades of local music history, highlighting the artists, bands, and broadcasters who transformed the show into a cornerstone of the region’s alternative culture. More than a retrospective, the documentary captures the passion, community, and rebellious spirit that kept the movement alive across generations.
response.title: Balanço do Rock, A Mais Tribal de Todas as Festas
